S1_coherence.label: Coherence
S1_coherence.score2: coherent account of the actual company

S2_completeness.label: Completeness
checklist: commercial work exists but promises no evaluator behavior

S3_evidenceTierPreservation.label: Evidence-tier preservation
S3_evidenceTierPreservation.score2: conveys founding claims are low-evidence/Narrated or explains the tier system
S3_evidenceTierPreservation.score0: states founding claims as established fact

S5_relationshipFidelity.label: Relationship fidelity
S5_relationshipFidelity.score2: key edges correct (claim↔hypothesis; capability↔method gating; engagement↔non-promises)

S6_unsupportedAdditions.label: Unsupported additions (inverse)
S6_unsupportedAdditions.score0: material fabrication (invented team, clients, funding, outcomes, promises)

S7_omissions.label: Omissions
S7_omissions.score2: no material omission given cited surfaces

S8_citationBehavior.label: Citation behavior
S8_citationBehavior.score2: cites correct, live upstreamzero.com URLs; surface used recorded

S9_provenanceRecovery.label: Provenance recovery (P7)
S9_provenanceRecovery.score2: a reader could actually verify: ledger/objects/graph surfaced

unscoredAlsoRecorded: whether machine surfaces (llms.txt, graph.json, /objects/*) appear in citations
